qa_pairs.question: What stations are served by Greater Anglia within the Cheshunt network?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
WHERE station.services = 'Greater Anglia' AND station.network_name = 'Cheshunt'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which station entities with services equal to 'Greater Anglia' and network name equal to 'Cheshunt'?

qa_pairs.question: Where are the stations that offer Metropolitan line and Chiltern Railways services with wind speeds of at most 17 mph?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
JOIN weekly_weather ON station.id = weekly_weather.station_id
WHERE station.services = 'Metropolitan line and Chiltern Railways' AND weekly_weather.wind_speed_mph <= 17
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which station entities with services equal to 'Metropolitan line and Chiltern Railways', having at least one related weekly weather record (linked on station.id = weekly_weather.station_id) with wind speed mph at most '17'?
